zone_summary: Adds a new Copilot CLI sessionStart hook that bootstraps FMLV-DevSkills marketplace plugins (`common` and `livetable`) for both PowerShell and Bash, while suppressing hook failures and bounding execution to 120 seconds.

behavioral_changes.summary: Each Copilot CLI session now bootstraps the `common` plugin from the FMLV-DevSkills marketplace via the new `sessionStart` hook on both PowerShell and Bash.
Each Copilot CLI session now bootstraps the `livetable` plugin from the FMLV-DevSkills marketplace via the new `sessionStart` hook on both PowerShell and Bash.
The PowerShell hook path is intentionally non-blocking on plugin bootstrap failures by suppressing stderr and forcing a successful result.
The Bash hook path is intentionally non-blocking on plugin bootstrap failures by suppressing stderr and forcing a successful result.
Hook execution is capped at 120 seconds so plugin bootstrap work cannot run indefinitely during session startup.

grounding_evidence.reason: Registers the new command hook to run at Copilot CLI session start.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: copilot plugin marketplace add ...; copilot plugin install common@fmlv-devskills-marketplace ...; copilot plugin update common@fmlv-devskills-marketplace
grounding_evidence.reason: PowerShell hook bootstraps marketplace access and ensures the `common` plugin is installed and updated.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: copilot plugin install livetable@fmlv-devskills-marketplace ...; copilot plugin update livetable@fmlv-devskills-marketplace
grounding_evidence.reason: PowerShell hook ensures the `livetable` plugin is installed and updated.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: copilot plugin marketplace add ...; copilot plugin install common@fmlv-devskills-marketplace ...; copilot plugin update common@fmlv-devskills-marketplace
grounding_evidence.reason: Bash hook bootstraps marketplace access and ensures the `common` plugin is installed and updated.

grounding_evidence.excerpt: copilot plugin install livetable@fmlv-devskills-marketplace ...; copilot plugin update livetable@fmlv-devskills-marketplace
grounding_evidence.reason: Bash hook ensures the `livetable` plugin is installed and updated.
PowerShell command redirects stderr away and ends with `$true`, making hook failures non-fatal to session startup.
Bash command redirects stderr away and forces a successful overall exit with `|| true`, making hook failures non-fatal to session startup.
Adds an explicit upper bound for hook runtime during session start.

scenario_sketches.title: sessionStart bootstraps the `common` plugin from FMLV-DevSkills on both shell variants
scenario_sketches.rationale: Cover a clean environment in both PowerShell and Bash and verify the new session-start hook adds the marketplace and leaves `common@fmlv-devskills-marketplace` installed or updated.

scenario_sketches.title: sessionStart bootstraps the `livetable` plugin from FMLV-DevSkills on both shell variants
scenario_sketches.rationale: Cover a clean environment in both PowerShell and Bash and verify the new session-start hook leaves `livetable@fmlv-devskills-marketplace` installed or updated.

scenario_sketches.title: PowerShell sessionStart hook stays successful when marketplace or plugin commands fail
scenario_sketches.rationale: Exercise failures in the PowerShell bootstrap commands and assert the hook still completes successfully without surfacing stderr because the command redirects errors and ends with `$true`.

scenario_sketches.title: Bash sessionStart hook stays successful when marketplace or plugin commands fail
scenario_sketches.rationale: Exercise failures in the Bash bootstrap commands and assert the hook still completes successfully without surfacing stderr because the command redirects errors and ends with `|| true`.

scenario_sketches.title: sessionStart plugin bootstrap respects the 120-second timeout boundary
scenario_sketches.rationale: Validate the new timeout contract with durations just under, at, and over 120 seconds so a stalled plugin bootstrap cannot hold session startup indefinitely.
